name: Nella
description: Reliability layer for AI coding agents

name: Content Pipeline
description: Local-first macOS content-ops hub (Electron + React + Express) that plans short-form content, round-trips the Mars Obsidian vault, and drives the OpenClaw VM pipeline.

name: Lumen Frontier
description: C4 model of Lumen Frontier — an Astro + React islands learning front-end (LumenOS widget dashboard + Lumenverse 3D explorer) with a scaffolded FastAPI backend.

name: Forge
description: C4 model of Forge — a macOS Electron AI orchestration center for media generation, agents, and Remotion demo videos.

name: Cortex
description: Private encrypted macOS desktop dashboard unifying a founder's habits, metrics, CRM, calendar and GTM — read/written by Claude via a 51-tool MCP server.

name: OmegaHack (CAROL)
description: Multi-agent PQRSD platform for the Alcaldia de Medellin — intake, PII redaction, Claude classification, legal-deadline routing and transparency.

name: Band of Agents
description: Multi-agent marketing content review board where competing reviewer agents negotiate a verdict in a Band room and escalate deadlocks to a human.
